overview: CaffeineCoach is a high-integrity, deterministic smart gym coaching app for serious lifters. Powered by a complete v2.4 engine with a 34-exercise immutable library, a 13-step deterministic workout generation pipeline, full recovery and fatigue modeling, and a transparent Coach Reasoning panel that explains every workout decision.
features: Recovery-aware focus muscle selection with priority scoring
Full EngineTrace transparency — 'Why this workout?' panel
Fatigue management with phase cycling (accumulation → intensification → deload)
Personal best tracking with Brzycki 1RM formula
Smart swap system ranked by movement type then alphabetical
Real-time set logging with RPE input and rest timer
Clean-slate upgrade — all data reset to v2.4 baseline
